Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Live searches limited to 2026-07-21 returned 154 open bounty-term matches, 290 reward-term matches, and 126 IssueHunt/funded-term matches. The bulk was generated bounty-board material, GrantFox 'Maybe Rewarded' tasks (no exact payout), direct/unverified promises, security reports, smart-contract/DeFi work, or spam/referral content. The only newly plausible normal-code task was triaged individually.

Live issue, comments, repository, and all-state PR search checked. Issue is open; created 2026-07-21T13:59:43Z and updated 2026-07-21T14:12:28Z. Its lone maintainer comment says implementation is ready, and open PR #113 was created 2026-07-21T14:13:09Z and updated 2026-07-21T14:16:17Z. The embedded Opire help text permits rewards but states no actual payer, amount, currency, payment route, deadline, or payout trigger.

All seven currently open bounty-mode tasks were fetched with both task get and mode-relevant submissions. They are platform-escrowed and have net rewards after 7.5% fee, but none passes competition: submission/unique-worker counts were 37/30, 43/35, 83/34, 16/13, 346/58, 407/78, and 160/66. The 16-submission captcha task also requires x402 payment and signing; the 160-submission note task requires an EIP-3009 payment signature. No task has <=10 visible unique competitors.

First-party API returned the same five OPEN-labelled listings: Cap for Clacton (deadline in the metadata is 2026-07-21 but the listing requires political/social-media engagement and says work ended July 19), Goatfish (social-media/video deliverable and 32 comments but complete entrant count unavailable), Panta (prediction-market promotion, 34 comments), Usuals (deadline passed), and Paj (deadline passed and winner announced). No listing met the work-type, freshness, and known-competition gates.
First-party endpoint returned only a Not Acceptable error and did not expose live listings. Status, payout, and competition are therefore unknown; no candidate can qualify.

rejected.reason: Rejected despite being fresh and in an active MIT repository: no exact funded reward or payment terms are present, and the maintainer already states the implementation is ready. Open PR https://github.com/oaslananka/infra-lens-mcp/pull/113 directly implements it, so visible competitor/solution count is at least one.
All seven live bounty-mode tasks exceeded the <=10 competition gate (13-78 visible unique worker addresses and 16-407 submissions). Two additionally require payment/signing.

Remaining fresh matches were generated/mirrored bounty-board posts, GrantFox Maybe Rewarded tasks without an exact task-specific payout, unverified offers, security reports, smart-contract/DeFi work, or referral/spam content.
No eligible listing: excluded political/social-media-spam work, excluded prediction-market promotion, expired/awarded listings, and a live social-media contest with unknown full participant count.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
